name: Chocolate Almond Spritz Wafers
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Semi-sweet chocolate squares (cut into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 400 degrees. In a large bowl, beat powdered sugar and margarine until light and fluffy. Add egg and almond extract; blend well. Sift flour into a measuring cup; level off. Stir in flour and salt; mix well. Place dough in cookie press and form 4 strips the length of an ungreased baking sheet. Score the dough at 2 1/2 inch intervals. Bake for 3 to 5 minutes or until set but not brown. Cut into individual cookies on scored lines. Remove from the baking sheet and cool completely.
Prepare glaze by melting chocolate and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and keep warm. Dip half of cooled cookies into glaze, allowing excess to drip off. Place on prepared sheets. Garnish with almond slices if desired. Allow glaze to set. Store between sheets of waxed paper in a cool place. Makes 8 dozen cookies.
